hotel_name: Khách sạn HAPPY (HAPPY HOTEL Kien Giang)

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.text: The hot water is very bad. It used solar for hot water without backup plan. NO HOT WATER ON RAINY DAY.  THE ROOM IS DIRTY, THE CONDOM IS STILL IN THE DRAWN fron previous couple.

reviews.title: Très bon séjour
reviews.positives: Hôtel tout neuf, bon accueil, très propre, chambre spacieuse.

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.text: The hotel is a bit dirty when I check in. There is still rubbish in the toilet. There is the ant in the sofa ans around the bed. The hotel is mostly for the couple who looking for the "quick make-up". The condom is still in the drawn. The bed is so bad as the ant crawl around the bed and blankets. The hotel used solar for hot water without any back up. There will be NO HOT WATER on the rainy day. NOT RECOMMENDED FOR THE FAMILY WITH CHILD.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives:
Le Nous avons passé un excellent séjour au Happy Hôtel à Rach Gia. Le rapport qualité-prix est vraiment très bon : chambre propre, confortable et bien située. Mais ce qui a rendu notre séjour encore meilleur, c’est surtout l’accueil et l’aide incroyable de la réceptionniste.
Elle s’est occupée de tout pour nous : réservation des billets pour Phu Quoc, organisation des taxis, conseils pour trouver de bons restaurants et même aide pour nos déplacements. Toujours souriante, disponible et très gentille, elle a vraiment pris soin de nous du début à la fin.
Un grand merci à toute l’équipe pour leur professionnalisme et leur gentillesse. Nous recommandons cet hôtel sans hésiter à tous ceux qui passent par Rach Gia !prix 
L'emplacement

reviews.title: Für einen Kurzaufenthalt (1-2 Tage) völlig ok, für länger eher nicht zu empfehlen.
reviews.positives: Die Lage ist nicht zentral, aber das Hotel liegt im Phu Cuong Quartier, das eigentlich auch fast alles anzubieten hat. Mit einem Roller ist Rach Gia jedoch sehr schnell erreichbar. (ca. 15 Min.)
reviews.negatives: Das Personal ist sehr unterschiedlich. Von unprofessionell und arrogant bis zu hilfsbereit und freundlich. Also, viel Glück beim Einchecken!

reviews.title: No hot water for shower
reviews.text: No hot water for shower, bed hard as a rock, good staff though. Room is advertised as king which it isn't and 30m2 be lucky to be 14m2 the room is tiny, false advertising at its finest.

reviews.title: Check in at 10:20, add 160k.
reviews.text: Check-in at 10:20, added 160k but negotiated down to 100, but they gave me a room with no windows, smaller than the Singapore room by about 12-13m while I booked a 30m-35m KING bed room. I requested to change rooms but close to 12 o'clock, they intended to make me stay in another tiny room, and I had to insist on getting the room as advertised on Agoda before they finally agreed to give me the room, even though the other room was extremely hot. The room was dirty, the bed sheets were flipped inside out from the previous guest instead of being replaced. The bathroom smelled of vomit. It’s my first time in the Mekong Delta and it might also be the last. From the people to the accommodation, nothing has given me a good impression.

reviews.title: not so happy
reviews.text:
we were given a room which was dirty: stains on the walls, ashtray full (we asked for a non-smoking room),  soap open in the bathroom and... a forgotten condom in a drawer...  Fortunately they moved us to another room which was OK - nothing special.
Staff was nice -

reviews.title: Accommodation Experience
reviews.text:
Discounted price, close to the center of Jianjiang City, making it very convenient to stroll in the city or walk by the beach.  
The first floor has a simple bar that offers basic noodles and drinks, but does not provide free breakfast, which should be clearly stated to avoid misleading guests.  
The room space is spacious, but the downside is that there is a lot of dust.  
Overall, it is still acceptable; at such a low price, it is already a great value.

reviews.title: A hotel far from the city center
reviews.text: The hotel is located in a newly developed part of town, with wide boulevards and lots of empty townhouses. Five minutes on foot to the nearest cafes and eateries, but they are not as lively as those in the central market. The room is sizeable and clean. But the weirdest thing is that the shampoo and soap dispensers are next to the sink unreachable from the shower! I recommend this hotel for its friendly and helpful staff.

In my opinion, the hotel should replace the wall paintings of women with landscape paintings for better suitability.

reviews.title: Great location for family with children
reviews.text: Despite a weird quirk like the shampoo & body wash soap dispenser outside of the shower above the toilet, the room is very nice. Great location if you have small children because it's right at the fun zone with water park. The hotel breakfast restaurant food is very good taste despite small menu. Plenty of restaurant ans cafe's right around the hotel. Would definitely return to this hotel next time I'm in Rach Gia

reviews.title: Good, if there is an opportunity I will come back.
reviews.text: The room is generally clean and has a beautiful view. However, the TV doesn't have many channels to watch; it would be better if I could watch YouTube or Netflix. The refrigerator had a strong jackfruit smell when I stayed there, so I couldn't keep a bottle of water in it as it would absorb the smell. The balcony hadn't been cleaned, and it was dirty. Besides that, the toilet was very good and spacious.

reviews.title: Rest stop
reviews.text: We chose the Happy Hotel to overnight before catching a ferry the next day. The staff were very helpful, the room was clean and well laid out. Nice view from the balcony and the bed was comfortable. Thanks Happy Hotel!
reviews.response: Chúng tôi rất mong sẽ sớm được chào đón bạn quay lại trong thời gian tới để mang đến những trải nghiệm còn tốt hơn nữa. Chúc bạn luôn nhiều sức khỏe và những chuyến đi thật đáng nhớ!

reviews.title: *good hotel with beautiful view, satisfactory within the price range*
reviews.text:
- The location is on a corner with street frontage near the amusement park in the Phu Cuong coastal urban area, offering a beautiful view of the city. Rooms with balconies are very chill, perfect for watching the sunset, and the beach is just 600 meters away. There is parking for cars opposite the reception area. The hotel sells coffee and breakfast right in the lobby, which is very convenient and reasonably priced. There are also many beautiful cafes nearby.
- The room is nice, simply decorated, fully equipped, with a landline phone that works. Everything is still new and does not have a musty smell like other places. Room 203 has three windows and one balcony door, so I really like the view. The doors are sturdy, making me feel safe. There is hot and cold water, and coffee and instant noodles are provided for free. The downsides are that the bed is quite firm, only 1.4 meters wide, soundproofing is weak, the TV does not have Internet, and the air conditioning is not cool enough quickly.
- The staff is nice, very supportive and attentive, and replies to messages quickly.

reviews.title: Exceptional

reviews.title: 服務人員很差
reviews.text: 原本訂好的房型，服務員隨便安排一間較小又差的房間，我要求給我網站預定的房型，確告知沒有房間了，而且前一天，我也先付了錢，就合理來說，應該是要保留，如果沒有的話，也應該給一間更好的房型，而不是告知我沒有了，要我體諒。那是不是應該退還我房型的價差，但也沒有退價差，真得服務很差。櫃台人員只會說越文，不會說越文的人，還是不要去住。
